title: Opening for Software Engineer at Milkbasket

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Milkbasket
jsonLd.description:
Join the Milkbasket family as a Software Engineer in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Milkbasket:
Milkbasket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket!
